name: create_document
description: Create a new document in a Fauna collection. Provide the collection name and document fields as data. Fauna automatically assigns a unique ID and tracks timestamps. The operation is ACID-compliant and immediately consistent across all regions.

parameters.name: collection
parameters.description: The name of the collection to create the document in.

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: The document fields and values to store.

body.query: Product.create({ name: 'Wireless Mouse', price: 24.99, category: 'electronics', in_stock: true })
